substitutionParameters.helpString: Specifies the base address for the object (required.)
substitutionParameters.name: $ADDRESS

substitutionParameters.helpString: Specifies the default Alarm Class to be used by any alarms for the data items (optional.)
substitutionParameters.name: $ALARM_CLASS

substitutionParameters.helpString: Provides a description for the object.
substitutionParameters.name: $DESCRIPTION

substitutionParameters.helpString: Specifies the device to be used by the data items (required.)
substitutionParameters.name: $DEVICE_ID

substitutionParameters.helpString: Specifies default security level for all data items.
substitutionParameters.name: $LEVEL

substitutionParameters.helpString: Specifies the resource to be used by the data items (required.)
substitutionParameters.name: $RESOURCE_ID

substitutionParameters.helpString: Specifies the default graphics screen to be used by the data items (optional.)
substitutionParameters.name: $SCREEN_ID
